vulnerabilities.type: Reflected XSS (likely bypass via naive sanitization)
vulnerabilities.description: User input in the 'name' parameter is reflected into the HTML response body. HTML tags appear to be blacklisted/stripped (e.g., <script> becomes 'alert(1)'), indicating a naive filter that is typically bypassable and likely enables reflected XSS.
Server headers disclose framework and versions: 'Server: Werkzeug/1.0.1 Python/2.7.18', which can aid targeted attacks.
